meta.description: 72 new test cases for the Breach Risk Assessment Calculator — not yet verified against RadarFirst
meta.status: UNVERIFIED — run each case in RadarFirst and record the result

focus_areas.gate1a: Cases T01–T10 — Gate 1a confirmed-safe mitigations with varied inputs
focus_areas.gate1b: Cases T11–T22 — Gate 1b assured-safe mitigations, all assured_safe keys covered
focus_areas.gate2: Cases T23–T36 — Gate 2 de-identified, edge cases with hacker/media/nature variants
focus_areas.gate3: Cases T37–T56 — Gate 3 readable+insufficient, full HIGH vs EXTREME matrix
focus_areas.gate4: Cases T57–T66 — Gate 4 sufficient+readable, mitigations NOT in 1a or 1b buckets
focus_areas.cross: Cases T67–T72 — Cross-cutting combinations to stress boundary conditions

meta.instructions: For each case, enter the inputs in the calculator UI, record the RadarFirst output, and mark match/mismatch. The predicted_result is what the v5 tree expects.

test_cases.mitigation_label: Recipient had the opportunity, but did not view, access, transfer, or use the data (unopened returned mail)
test_cases.rationale: Worst-case inputs (plain text + malicious + ransomware + hacker) but Gate 1a fires first — unopened overrides everything

test_cases.compromise_description: Hacking or malware other than ransomware
test_cases.mitigation_label: Forensic analysis concluded that regulated data was not compromised (not viewed, accessed, transferred, or used)
test_cases.rationale: Redacted + malicious + media + hacking but forensic confirmation → LOW

test_cases.mitigation_label: Recovered or restored from backup without high risk to data integrity or availability
test_cases.rationale: backup = confirmed_safe, fires Gate 1a

test_cases.mitigation_label: Recipient could not reasonably retain the data
test_cases.rationale: no_retain = confirmed_safe, first gate fires

test_cases.mitigation_label: Recovered or restored from backup without high risk to data integrity or availability
test_cases.rationale: Plain text + improper disposal but backup recovery confirmed → LOW

test_cases.mitigation_label: Recipient could not reasonably retain the data
test_cases.rationale: Member of general public (unauthorized) but no_retain fires Gate 1a

test_cases.mitigation_label: Forensic analysis concluded that regulated data was not compromised (not viewed, accessed, transferred, or used)
test_cases.rationale: Theft by hacker but forensic confirmed no compromise → LOW

test_cases.mitigation_label: Recipient had the opportunity, but did not view, access, transfer, or use the data (unopened returned mail)
test_cases.rationale: Covered entity but unauthorized access — unopened still fires Gate 1a

test_cases.recipient_description: Federal agency obligated to Privacy Act of 1974 and FISMA
test_cases.mitigation_label: Forensic analysis concluded that regulated data was not compromised (not viewed, accessed, transferred, or used)
test_cases.rationale: Federal agency + forensic confirmed → LOW

test_cases.mitigation_label: Recovered or restored from backup without high risk to data integrity or availability
test_cases.rationale: Ransomware + media but backup recovery confirmed → LOW (Gate 1a before Gate 2)

test_cases.mitigation_label: Written assurance was provided (confidentiality agreement, attestation), and data will not be further used or disclosed
test_cases.rationale: written_provided = assured_safe → MODERATE

test_cases.mitigation_label: Satisfactory assurance was obtained from a recipient that is obligated to protect personal data by law and/or contract
test_cases.rationale: satisfactory = assured_safe, first untested assured key

test_cases.mitigation_label: No written assurance was obtained since recipient (CE or BA) is obligated to safeguard regulated data
test_cases.rationale: ce_ba_obligated = assured_safe

test_cases.mitigation_label: No written assurance was obtained
test_cases.rationale: no_written_obtained = assured_safe

test_cases.mitigation_label: No written assurance was provided
test_cases.rationale: no_written_provided = assured_safe

test_cases.mitigation_label: Appropriate actions to sufficiently mitigate risk were taken in accordance with company policy
test_cases.rationale: company_policy = assured_safe even with plain text + malicious

test_cases.mitigation_label: Written assurance was obtained (confidentiality agreement, attestation), and data will not be further used or disclosed
test_cases.rationale: Gate 1b fires before Gate 3 — even unauthorized vendor + malicious, written assurance = MODERATE

test_cases.mitigation_label: Recipient confirmed receipt and use of data as permitted
test_cases.rationale: permitted = assured_safe, Gate 1b fires before recipient type matters

test_cases.mitigation_label: Satisfactory assurance was obtained from a recipient that is obligated to protect personal data by law and/or contract
test_cases.rationale: Plain text + general public but satisfactory assurance → MODERATE

test_cases.recipient_description: Federal agency obligated to Privacy Act of 1974 and FISMA
test_cases.mitigation_label: Since recipient is obligated to protect personal data by law and/or contract, no assurance was obtained
test_cases.rationale: Federal agency + obligated_no_assurance = assured_safe

test_cases.mitigation_label: No written assurance was obtained
test_cases.rationale: Service provider + no_written_obtained = assured_safe

test_cases.mitigation_label: Appropriate actions to sufficiently mitigate risk were taken in accordance with company policy
test_cases.rationale: company_policy = assured_safe

test_cases.compromise_description: Hacking or malware other than ransomware
test_cases.mitigation_label: Unable to retrieve or unsure of disposition
test_cases.rationale: De-id + hacker + malicious → MODERATE (high-risk recipient + malicious nature sub-rule)

test_cases.mitigation_label: Unable to retrieve or unsure of disposition
test_cases.rationale: De-id + hacker but NOT malicious (nature=0.30 < 0.80) → LOW

test_cases.mitigation_label: Confirmed improper use or further exposure
test_cases.rationale: De-id + hacker + intentional not malicious (0.45 < 0.80) → LOW

test_cases.mitigation_label: Destroyed properly but unsure of backup or copy status
test_cases.rationale: De-id + media + malicious → MODERATE

test_cases.mitigation_label: Unknown
test_cases.rationale: De-id + media + intentional NOT malicious → LOW (nature 0.45 < 0.80)

test_cases.compromise_description: Good faith acquisition, access, or use
test_cases.mitigation_label: Confirmed viewing or acquisition without evidence of any improper use by recipient
test_cases.rationale: De-id + authorized + unintentional → LOW

test_cases.mitigation_label: Data has been sent to media or published
test_cases.rationale: De-id + sent_to_media — Gate 2 fires before Gate 3, returns LOW (de-identified data sent to media is low impact)

test_cases.mitigation_label: Unknown
test_cases.rationale: De-id + ransomware + unknown recipient but no ransomware_confirmed in mitigation → LOW

test_cases.mitigation_label: High risk data, namely SSN, or other personal information exposed
test_cases.rationale: De-id + ssn_exposed — since data is de-identified SSN exposure claim is contradictory but Gate 2 fires first → LOW

test_cases.mitigation_label: Confirmed improper use or further exposure
test_cases.rationale: De-id + attorney + improper_use → LOW (Gate 2 fires, attorney is not media/hacker)

test_cases.recipient_description: Employee, workforce member, or agent of the entity
test_cases.mitigation_label: Destroyed properly but unsure of backup or copy status
test_cases.rationale: De-id + internal employee + insufficient → LOW

test_cases.mitigation_label: Unable to retrieve or unsure of disposition
test_cases.rationale: De-id + parent guardian + insufficient → LOW

test_cases.compromise_description: Hacking or malware other than ransomware
test_cases.mitigation_label: Unable to retrieve or unsure of disposition
test_cases.rationale: De-id + hacker + malicious → MODERATE (high-risk + malicious sub-rule)

test_cases.mitigation_label: Confirmed ransomware acquisition with high risk to data integrity or availability
test_cases.rationale: De-id + ransomware_confirmed → MODERATE (specific mitigation sub-rule)

test_cases.mitigation_label: Confirmed ransomware acquisition with high risk to data integrity or availability
test_cases.rationale: Plain text + hacker + insufficient → EXTREME (unauthorized)

test_cases.mitigation_label: Data has been sent to media or published
test_cases.rationale: Readable + media (unauthorized) + insufficient → EXTREME

test_cases.mitigation_label: Unknown
test_cases.rationale: Physical safeguard (readable) + vendor (unauthorized) + insufficient → EXTREME

test_cases.mitigation_label: Unable to retrieve or unsure of disposition
test_cases.rationale: Readable + general public (unauthorized) + insufficient → EXTREME

test_cases.mitigation_label: Destroyed properly but unsure of backup or copy status
test_cases.rationale: Customer is unauthorized + readable + insufficient → EXTREME

test_cases.mitigation_label: Confirmed viewing or acquisition without evidence of any improper use by recipient
test_cases.rationale: Parent/guardian is unauthorized → EXTREME

test_cases.mitigation_label: Unknown
test_cases.rationale: Authorized + insufficient + unknown_mit (EXTREME_MIT bucket) → EXTREME

test_cases.mitigation_label: High risk data, namely SSN, or other personal information exposed
test_cases.rationale: Authorized + insufficient + ssn_exposed (EXTREME_MIT) → EXTREME

test_cases.mitigation_label: Data has been sent to media or published
test_cases.rationale: Authorized + insufficient + sent_to_media (EXTREME_MIT) → EXTREME

test_cases.mitigation_label: Confirmed improper use or further exposure
test_cases.rationale: Authorized + insufficient + improper_use (NOT in EXTREME_MIT) → HIGH

test_cases.mitigation_label: Unable to retrieve or unsure of disposition
test_cases.rationale: Authorized + insufficient + unable_retrieve → HIGH

test_cases.mitigation_label: Confirmed viewing or acquisition without evidence of any improper use by recipient
test_cases.rationale: Authorized + insufficient + confirmed_viewing → HIGH

test_cases.mitigation_label: Destroyed properly but unsure of backup or copy status
test_cases.rationale: Authorized + insufficient + unsure_backup → HIGH

test_cases.compromise_description: Good faith acquisition, access, or use
test_cases.mitigation_label: Confirmed ransomware acquisition with high risk to data integrity or availability
test_cases.rationale: Authorized + insufficient + ransomware_confirmed (NOT in EXTREME_MIT for Gate 3) → HIGH

test_cases.compromise_description: Hacking or malware other than ransomware
test_cases.mitigation_label: Destroyed properly but unsure of backup or copy status
test_cases.rationale: Non-custodial parent is unauthorized → EXTREME

test_cases.mitigation_label: Confirmed viewing or acquisition without evidence of any improper use by recipient
test_cases.rationale: Financial professional is unauthorized → EXTREME

test_cases.recipient_description: Relative or household member of patient, insured member, or customer
test_cases.mitigation_label: Unable to retrieve or unsure of disposition
test_cases.rationale: Relative is unauthorized → EXTREME

test_cases.recipient_description: Federal agency obligated to Privacy Act of 1974 and FISMA
test_cases.mitigation_label: Unable to retrieve or unsure of disposition
test_cases.rationale: Federal agency (authorized) + insufficient + standard mitigation → HIGH

test_cases.recipient_description: Employee, workforce member, or agent of the entity
test_cases.mitigation_label: Confirmed improper use or further exposure
test_cases.rationale: Employee (authorized) + insufficient + improper_use → HIGH

test_cases.recipient_description: Partner or significant other not in the household
test_cases.mitigation_label: Confirmed improper use or further exposure
test_cases.rationale: Partner (unauthorized) + readable + insufficient → EXTREME

test_cases.mitigation_label: Confirmed viewing or acquisition without evidence of any improper use by recipient
test_cases.rationale: GATE 4 TEST — confirmed_viewing is not in Gate 1a or 1b, readable + sufficient → MODERATE

test_cases.mitigation_label: Destroyed properly but unsure of backup or copy status
test_cases.rationale: GATE 4 TEST — unsure_backup not in 1a/1b, readable + sufficient → MODERATE

test_cases.mitigation_label: Unable to retrieve or unsure of disposition
test_cases.rationale: GATE 4 TEST — unable_retrieve not in 1a/1b, readable + sufficient → MODERATE

test_cases.mitigation_label: Confirmed ransomware acquisition with high risk to data integrity or availability
test_cases.rationale: GATE 4 TEST — ransomware_confirmed with SUFFICIENT disposition, readable → MODERATE

test_cases.mitigation_label: Confirmed improper use or further exposure
test_cases.rationale: GATE 4 TEST — improper_use with SUFFICIENT disposition, readable → MODERATE (disposition=sufficient blocks Gate 3)

test_cases.compromise_description: Good faith acquisition, access, or use
test_cases.mitigation_label: Destroyed properly but unsure of backup or copy status
test_cases.rationale: GATE 4 TEST — good faith + sufficient + unsure_backup → MODERATE

test_cases.mitigation_label: Confirmed viewing or acquisition without evidence of any improper use by recipient
test_cases.rationale: GATE 4 TEST — unauthorized attorney but SUFFICIENT disposition, confirmed_viewing not in 1a/1b → MODERATE

test_cases.mitigation_label: Unable to retrieve or unsure of disposition
test_cases.rationale: GATE 4 TEST — unknown recipient + sufficient disposition, unable_retrieve → MODERATE

test_cases.mitigation_label: Unknown
test_cases.rationale: GATE 4 TEST — unknown_mit with SUFFICIENT disposition → MODERATE (Gate 3 requires insufficient)

test_cases.mitigation_label: Confirmed viewing or acquisition without evidence of any improper use by recipient
test_cases.rationale: GATE 4 TEST — unauthorized customer but sufficient disposition, Gate 4 fires → MODERATE

test_cases.mitigation_label: High risk data, namely SSN, or other personal information exposed
test_cases.rationale: Worst case: every input is maximum risk → EXTREME

test_cases.mitigation_label: Written assurance was obtained (confidentiality agreement, attestation), and data will not be further used or disclosed
test_cases.rationale: Terrible inputs but Gate 1b fires first — written assurance with any protection level → MODERATE

test_cases.mitigation_label: Forensic analysis concluded that regulated data was not compromised (not viewed, accessed, transferred, or used)
test_cases.rationale: De-id + hacker + ransomware + malicious — but forensic confirmed safe → LOW (Gate 1a beats everything)

test_cases.compromise_description: Good faith acquisition, access, or use
test_cases.mitigation_label: Confirmed viewing or acquisition without evidence of any improper use by recipient
test_cases.rationale: Good faith + CE but plain text + insufficient + confirmed_viewing → HIGH (not EXTREME — authorized)

test_cases.compromise_description: Hacking or malware other than ransomware
test_cases.recipient_description: Business associate or state government agency
test_cases.mitigation_label: Data has been sent to media or published
test_cases.rationale: Authorized BA but sent_to_media (EXTREME_MIT) → EXTREME

test_cases.mitigation_label: No written assurance was provided
test_cases.rationale: Low-risk inputs but no assurance provided → MODERATE (Gate 1b fires for no_written_provided)
